sql:
SELECT 
            DISTINCT PM.NODE_ID, 
            PM.IF_ID ,
            IP_ADDR , 
            IF_SPEED
        FROM RESOURCE.TB_PORT_MST PM
        WHERE NOT EXISTS (
            SELECT 1
            FROM RESOURCE.TB_BACKBONE_LINK BL
            WHERE BL.SRC_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.SRC_IF_ID  = PM.IF_ID
               OR BL.DEST_NODE_ID = PM.NODE_ID AND BL.DEST_IF_ID = PM.IF_ID
            )
          AND  PM.NODE_ID = 'busan-7712' 
          AND IF_OPER_STATUS = 'up'
        ORDER BY IF_ID
